AR1.justification: Routed to observations.md with explicit rationale citing the descriptive-pattern bar and ruling out decisions.md and followups.md against their strict bars.

AR2.justification: Non-procedure routing scenario; no runbook steps to artifact-bind.

AR3.justification: Daybook Log line references the new observation and the observation/daybook are both ISO-dated; no absolute paths or broken anchors evident.

AR4.justification: Append-only entry to observations.md and a fresh dated daybook file — re-running would add a second dated entry, not corrupt history.
